scripts.build:frontend: cd ../.. && source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 24 && yarn workspace @llm-proxy/frontend exec -- vite build
scripts.build: yarn build:frontend && yarn workspace @llm-proxy/backend exec -- tsc && electrobun build && bash scripts/bundle-resources.sh
scripts.postbuild: echo 'Resources bundled. Run: open build/*/LLM\ Proxy\ Gateway*.app'
